metadata.chapter_title: Nature and Properties of the Planets

content_blocks.text:
शीर्षोदयगतः खेटः पाकादौ फलदो भवेत् ।
पृष्ठोदयस्थः पाकांते सदा चोभयराशिगः ॥ ८६ ॥

Sloka. 86. A planet in a Sirshodaya sign (Vide
Adhyaya 1. Sloka. 14) yields fruit at the initial portion
of the period of life influenced by him. But the same
planet in a Prishtodaya sign does it at the final stage.
But if he should be in a sign which has both the charac-
teristics, he becomes fruitful at all times.

आद्यन्तमध्यफलदः शिरः पृष्ठोभयोदये ।
दशाप्रवेशे समये तिष्ठन्याच्यो दशापतिः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आद्यन्तमध्यफलदः शिरः पृष्ठोभयोदये ।
दशाप्रवेशे समये तिष्ठन्याच्यो दशापतिः ॥

content_blocks.text:
आदौ दशासु फलदः शीषोंदयराशिसंस्थितो विहगः ।
उभयोदये च मध्ये स्वान्त्ये पृष्ठोदये च नीचनें ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आदौ दशासु फलदः शीषोंदयराशिसंस्थितो विहगः ।
उभयोदये च मध्ये स्वान्त्ये पृष्ठोदये च नीचनें ॥

content_blocks.text:
समस्तहोराफलसारसान्द्रविराजिते जातकपारिजाते ।
ग्रहक्रियारूपगुणप्रभेदः संकीर्त्तितः खेटकृपाकटाक्षात् ॥ ८७ ॥

Sloka. 87. By the special favor of the planets, the
diversity of their work, form and properties has been
set forth in the Jataka Parijata which has therefore be-
come abundantly illuminated with the pith of planetary
effects treated of in all astrological works.

इति श्रीनवग्रहकृपया वैद्यनाथविरचिते
जातकपारिजाते ग्रहखरूपगुणाध्यायो द्वितीयः ।।

Thus ends the second adhyaya upon the 'Nature
and Properties of the Planets' in the work 'Jataka Pari-
jata' composed by Vaidyanatha uder the auspices of the
nine planets.

raw_text:
Sl. 86-87 द्वितीयोऽध्यायः 95
शीर्षोदयगतः खेटः पाकादौ फलदो भवेत् ।
पृष्ठोदयस्थः पाकांते सदा चोभयराशिगः ॥ ८६ ॥
Sloka. 86. A planet in a Sirshodaya sign (Vide
Adhyaya 1. Sloka. 14) yields fruit at the initial portion
of the period of life influenced by him. But the same
planet in a Prishtodaya sign does it at the final stage.
But if he should be in a sign which has both the charac-
teristics, he becomes fruitful at all times.
०१. गृहजातक
पृष्ठोभयकोट भिंगारवन्तेन्तः प्रथमेषु पाकदाः ॥
Also गार्गः
आद्यन्तमध्यफलदः शिरः पृष्ठोभयोदये ।
दशाप्रवेशे समये तिष्ठन्याच्यो दशापतिः ॥
Also. साराबलौ
आदौ दशासु फलदः शीषोंदयराशिसंस्थितो विहगः ।
उभयोदये च मध्ये स्वान्त्ये पृष्ठोदये च नीचनें ॥
समस्तहोराफलसारसान्द्रविराजिते जातकपारिजाते ।
ग्रहक्रियारूपगुणप्रभेदः संकीर्त्तितः खेटकृपाकटाक्षात् ॥ ८७ ॥
Sloka. 87. By the special favor of the planets, the
diversity of their work, form and properties has been
set forth in the Jataka Parijata which has therefore be-
come abundantly illuminated with the pith of planetary
effects treated of in all astrological works.
इति श्रीनवग्रहकृपया वैद्यनाथविरचिते
जातकपारिजाते ग्रहखरूपगुणाध्यायो द्वितीयः ।।
Thus ends the second adhyaya upon the 'Nature
and Properties of the Planets' in the work 'Jataka Pari-
jata' composed by Vaidyanatha uder the auspices of the
nine planets.
